creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #1)

> Feel free to commit it. No need for my approval if you want to update this port.

I'm not sure how to interpret this reply. You're the maintainer of the port, I'm not sure if I can commit it without your approval, unless you don't intend to maintain the port, and would like me to maintain it. I started using it, so I'm happy to maintain it, if you are fine with transferring its maintainership to me.

Thanks!
